sources.label: microcenter.com
sources.reason: This vendor is blocked — an anti-bot wall we have no working path through right now — so re-running won't help. **What to do:** nothing in the app recovers this; getting it working needs deeper scraper changes and isn't guaranteed. Cloudflare challenge served even at min_tier:3. Bumping to min_tier:4 produces silent AlterLab failure (body_len=0). No working path today — this is a vendor-level outage waiting on AlterLab tier investigation. Re-verified 2026-05-25 (Phase 27 D3, see docs/microcenter_reprobe_2026_05_25.md): 3 distinct detail URLs (CPU, SSD, motherboard) all returned 0 priced products through AlterLab at the registry defaults — either a 39-char stub or ~32 KB Cloudflare challenge body. The Phase 26 stress26-mc success was a single cache-hit outlier, NOT a recovery; keep this block at `blocker` until the underlying bypass is solved.
